zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fleming於大約1347年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍 卡素時，她的父親Simon le Fleming21歲，母親Cicely Champernon19歲。她於1372年與William de Basset III在英國可瓦爾特希迪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年8月7日在英國可瓦爾特希迪享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fleming于大约1347年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍 卡素时，她的父亲Simon le Fleming21岁，母亲Cicely Champernon19岁。她于1372年与William de Basset III在英国可瓦爾特希迪结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年8月7日在英国可瓦爾特希迪享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fleming was born about 1347, in Slane Castle, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Simon le Fleming, was 21 and her mother, Cicely Champernon, was 19. She married William de Basset III in 1372, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 7 August 1387, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fleming est née environ 1347, à Slane Castle, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Simon le Fleming, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Cicely Champernon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William de Basset III en 1372, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1387, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Fleming um 1347 in Slane Castle, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon le Fleming 21 und ihre Mutter Cicely Champernon 19. Sie hat 1372 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England William de Basset III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. August 1387 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Tehidy, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fleming è nata il circa 1347 nel Slane Castle, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Simon le Fleming, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Cicely Champernon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William de Basset III nel 1372, nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 agosto 1387, nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Flemingが約1347年にアイルランドコウントイ メアススラン カストルで生まれた時，父Simon le Flemingは21歳，母Cicely Champernonは19歳であった。1372年にイギリスコルンワルテヒディでWilliam de Basset IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年8月7日にイギリスコルンワルテヒディで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fleming(이)가 대략 1347년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon le Fleming(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely Champernon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1372년 영국 코른월 테히디에서 William de Basset III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 8월 7일 영국 코른월 테히디에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fleming nasceu aproximadamente 1347, em Slane Castle, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Simon le Fleming, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Champernon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Basset III em 1372, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1387, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fleming родилась около 1347 г. в местности слан кастл, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Simon le Fleming было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Cicely Champernon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Basset III в 1372 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 августа 1387 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Fleming nació aproximadamente 1347, en Slane Castle, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Simon le Fleming, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Cicely Champernon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William de Basset III en 1372, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1387, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
